overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Star Wars video game showing a character exploring an alien valley at sunset. The character walks through narrow canyons and open grasslands with floating rocks in the sky, eventually entering shallow water near large alien creatures.

events.description: exiting narrow canyon into open valley with view of distant mountains

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the narrow canyon toward the open valley exit

entered.detail: tall rocky cliff face forming the left side of the canyon
tall rocky cliff face forming the right side of the canyon
opening between the canyon walls leading to the valley beyond
large rock formations floating in the sky visible through the canyon exit

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow canyon passage with tall rock walls on both sides, moving toward an opening that reveals a distant valley and floating rocks against a sunset sky.

agents.ego_description: walking across open grassland toward a large rocky mountain structure ahead

entered.detail: massive rocky mountain with layered stone formations dominating the horizon
open field covered with dry grass and scattered low vegetation

segments.scene_description: Having exited the canyon, the character traverses an open grassland with sparse vegetation, approaching a massive rocky mountain that rises ahead against the colorful dusk sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: alien valley with floating rock formations

events.description: location text 'GATA VALLEY' and 'MIROGANA VALLEY' appears on screen identifying the region

agents.ego_description: walking through the open valley while turning right to survey the landscape with floating rocks

entered.detail: distinctive red-hued mountain formation visible on the right horizon
multiple large rocks floating in the sky scattered across the valley

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a wide alien valley as the camera turns to reveal floating rock formations scattered across the sky and a distinctive red mountain on the right, with location text appearing to identify the valley.

scene_state.functional_zone: shallow water canyon with alien wildlife

events.description: entering shallow water as the terrain transitions from dry ground to creek bed
approaching herd of large alien quadruped creatures standing in the water ahead

agents.ego_description: wading through shallow water toward large alien creatures in the canyon ahead

notable_agents.action: herd of large quadrupedal alien creatures standing in the shallow water ahead

entered.detail: calm reflective water covering the ground in the canyon bottom
large gray quadrupedal creatures resembling alien livestock or wildlife
tall rock walls forming a narrow canyon around the water path

segments.scene_description: The character enters a shallow water canyon, wading through the reflective creek bed while approaching a herd of large alien quadruped creatures standing in the water ahead, with canyon walls rising on both sides.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey from the confines of a narrow canyon into a vast, surreal alien valley under a sunset sky. It begins by moving through a tight rock passage, gradually emerging into an open grassland where sparse vegetation leads toward a massive mountain rising against the colorful dusk. As the terrain expands, the camera pans to reveal floating rock formations scattered across the horizon and a distinctive red mountain to the right. The scene then shifts as the character descends into a shallow water canyon, wading through a reflective creek bed before finally approaching a herd of large alien quadruped creatures standing amidst the rising canyon walls.
